label: Latin America (illustrative; e.g. Brazil CONAR, Mexico PROFECO). Demo rules, not legal advice.

rules.check: Copy and disclosures should be localized into the market language (Portuguese for Brazil, Spanish for most of LATAM).
Health and efficacy claims for supplements require substantiation and, in several markets, regulatory registration before promotion.
Advertising self-regulation bodies (e.g. CONAR in Brazil) expect truthful, non-misleading, non-denigrating claims.
Consumer-protection rules (e.g. Mexico PROFECO) require clear terms for promotions and 'free' offers.
